description: Evals for quant-tdd skill — verifies RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle is followed, test is written before implementation, canonical sources are used, and drift check is included.

tests.prompt: implement a new VWAP filter in build_daily_features.py

assertions.description: Writes or discusses writing a test BEFORE the implementation code
Checks TEST_MAP or post-edit-pipeline.py for test file mapping
References test file path matching tests/test_<module>/test_<filename>.py convention
Does NOT write implementation code before the test (no def.*vwap in production code section before test section)
References canonical sources (asset_configs, dst, cost_model, etc.) — never hardcodes
Instructs to run pytest to verify the test FAILS first
Includes drift check (check_drift.py) in the completion/verification step
Mentions blast-radius check before touching production code
Reads existing tests to understand fixtures and style before writing new test
Includes completion gate or checklist items (every new function has a test, RED verified, GREEN verified, etc.)
assertions.pattern: completion gate|every new function|RED verified|GREEN verified|\[ \]|\[x\]
